summary: Full backend + frontend testing on Pool Kiosk (Expo landscape 1024x600). All 9 pytest backend tests pass. All required API endpoints work correctly and persist data. Frontend loads perfectly: dashboard with 4 metric cards, temp history chart, pressure gauge, sidebar with 9 items, 10 widgets, 4 equipment toggles. All navigation, add-schedule, save-settings, and widget-toggle flows functional.

issues: Main header stays 'Tableau de bord' regardless of active tab (Programmation, Widgets, Paramètres, etc.). Consider dynamic title reflecting current section for kiosk clarity.
Top of 'Programmation filtration' title appears slightly clipped under sticky header when landing on the screen (see screenshot 03).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Non-blocking but should be migrated to style.pointerEvents to be future-proof.

action_items: (Optional) Make header title dynamic per active screen instead of always 'Tableau de bord'.
(Optional) Adjust top padding on ScheduleScreen so 'Programmation filtration' heading isn't clipped by sticky header.
(Optional) Replace deprecated props.pointerEvents with style.pointerEvents to silence RN warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~520 lines - approaching the 700-line limit; consider splitting simulator loop, MQTT bridge, and routes into separate modules if it grows further.

safety_check() runs every 2s inside simulator loop; fine for demo, but ensure this is skipped in production when real MQTT broker is used to avoid duplicate DB writes if brokered readings arrive asynchronously.
All routes strip Mongo _id correctly using projection or _strip_id helper - good.
Env vars accessed via os.environ[...] with no defaults - fails fast on missing config, correct pattern.
seed_data_creation: None. Schedules created during add-schedule test were deleted or left as demo data. Settings changed briefly then restored to defaults.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Frontend runs in 1024x600 landscape (kiosk mode). Testids in place: dashboard-screen, sidebar, nav-{home,temperature,water,equipment,schedule,history,alerts,widgets,settings}, widget-{id}, equipment-toggle-{id}, widget-toggle-{id}, add-schedule, save-settings. Simulator sensor loop runs every 2s so values drift naturally between calls.
